name: spec-autopilot
description: Spec-driven autopilot with cross-phase parallel dispatch (Phase 1/4/5/6), Phase 6 tri-path parallel (test + code review + quality scans), mixed-mode parallel implementation (worktree + domain partition + batch review), Allure unified test reporting with anomaly alerts, requirement-driven test traceability matrix, enhanced decision cards with research evidence for all complexity levels, code constraint enforcement (forbidden + required patterns + style guide), built-in phase templates, weighted anti-rationalization, persistent knowledge accumulation, crash recovery, and model routing
